---
name: "\u270F️ Development Task"
about: Track a piece of work tied to a milestone or feature
title: "[TASK] What needs to be done?"
labels: [task]
assignees: []
---

### 📌 Task Summary
What is this task or subtask?

### 🗂 Milestone / Module
e.g. M1 - Watcher, M5 - Metadata Editor

### ⚙️ Component(s)
e.g. core/watcher.py, ui/mainwindow.py

### ⏱ Estimated Time
- [ ] < 1 hour
- [ ] 1–4 hours
- [ ] Full day
- [ ] Multi-day

### ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Task is defined
- [ ] Assigned to milestone
- [ ] Has clear output
